S.FORM: Matthew Arkin kawas tay 1960, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 3, Matthew Arkin, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: mattħew arkin kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mattħew arkin, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
